introSection: Mind Eraser is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Mind Eraser opened on June 2, 1997. It was built on the former site of Runaway Train and Avalanche. It has the same color scheme as Mind Eraser at Six Flags Darien Lake and formerly Mind Eraser at Six Flags New England before it became Riddler Revenge in 2018.

fullText:
Mind Eraser is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA. It is a Suspended Looping Coaster built by Vekoma.

Mind Eraser opened on June 2, 1997. It was built on the former site of Runaway Train and Avalanche. It has the same color scheme as Mind Eraser at Six Flags Darien Lake and formerly Mind Eraser at Six Flags New England before it became Riddler Revenge in 2018.
